notes: Qwen CPU inference was slow during live verification; GPU is recommended for demos.
First model/OCR startup can be slower because model files are loaded from disk or downloaded when not cached.
Use HF_LOCAL_FILES_ONLY=true after caching the Hugging Face model for restricted-network demos.
Deterministic sample field scoring is tracked separately in docs/sample-evaluation.json using scripts/evaluate_sample_outputs.py.
